message.content: {"items":[{"title":"European Working Conditions Survey 2010","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10726","justification":"Cross-national survey on working conditions in Europe conducted in 2010. Includes many of the listed countries (EU member states and some associated countries) and covers employment conditions, work organization, health and safety, and work–life balance during the early 2010s."},{"title":"European Working Conditions Survey 2015","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13226","justification":"Large-scale 2015 wave of the EWCS focusing on working conditions across European countries, including most of the countries specified. Provides detailed measures of job quality, working time, work intensity, and occupational health in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"European Company Survey 2013","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11871","justification":"Establishment-level survey on workplace practices and working conditions across European countries around 2013. Includes information on work organization, employee participation, and HR practices relevant to working conditions in many of the requested countries."},{"title":"European Company Survey 2010","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10097","justification":"Firm-level data from 2010 on company policies, work organization, and employment practices across European countries. Useful for analyzing structural determinants of working conditions in the early 2010s for several of the mentioned countries."},{"title":"European Working Conditions Survey 2010 – 5th wave: GESIS Edition","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5846","justification":"GESIS edition of the 5th EWCS wave including harmonized variables and documentation. Focuses explicitly on working conditions in European countries in 2010, including many of the listed states."},{"title":"European Working Conditions Survey 2015 – 6th wave: GESIS Edition","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6786","justification":"Harmonized GESIS version of the 2015 EWCS. Contains detailed, comparable indicators of working conditions across a broad set of European countries in the mid‑2010s, covering most of the countries in the query."},{"title":"Working Conditions and Quality of Work: European Social Survey Round 5 (2010) – Module","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5449","justification":"ESS Round 5 includes a rotating module on work, family, and well-being, with multiple items on working conditions (job security, autonomy, work pressure) for many European countries in 2010, overlapping substantially with the listed countries."},{"title":"Working Conditions in the European Union: European Social Survey Round 6 (2012) – Selected Items","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5800","justification":"ESS Round 6 contains several core and rotating items related to employment and working life, allowing analysis of working conditions in 2012 for a broad set of European countries, including many in your list."},{"title":"European Social Survey Round 7 (2014) – Work-related Items","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6670","justification":"ESS Round 7 provides cross-national microdata with standard questions on employment status, contract type, working hours, and job characteristics for numerous European countries in 2014, largely overlapping with the requested set."},{"title":"European Social Survey Round 8 (2016) – Work and Welfare Items","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6960","justification":"ESS Round 8 includes employment and work-related variables suitable for studying aspects of working conditions in 2016 across many European countries, including a substantial subset of those specified for the 2010s."}]}
